about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Crafting sweet memories since 2018
about.content1: Welcome to Tarie Cakes, where every creation tells a story of passion, precision, and unparalleled craftsmanship. Founded in Mutare, Zimbabwe, we specialize in luxury bespoke cakes that transform your celebrations into extraordinary moments.
about.content2: Our master baker combines traditional techniques with contemporary flair, using only the finest ingredients sourced globally to create cakes that are as visually stunning as they are delicious.
